choices: Have Some Fun In The Kitchen
1.content:
You are Jack, a 13 year old who has been shrunk in a hotel. You had no idea how to have shrunk but you are glad because it took you away from evil parents that didn’t even bother to look for you.

Jack has been 1cm like this for a 1 year and a half now and you now how to get around the whole hotel.

Jack spends his days sneaking food, messing with the guests and perking on the ladies.

He travels through the walls and floorboards under the hotel and gets trough cracks and crevices nobody knows about.

Jack is also invincible. Every time he gets squish it doesn’t kill him (it hurts a lot though, so he tries to avoid it.)

What does Jack decide to do today.
1.title: Tiny Living In A Hotel.

12.content:
Today Jack decides to go to one of the floor and randomly go into on of the bedrooms. Maybe he can find something valuable, maybe he can be nosey or maybe he can perve on a beautiful giantess.

Jack is on the second floor and goes into room 26. He has know idea whose room it is but he doesn’t care (as long as he doesn’t see a guys junk). Jack easily goes under the door and into the room. He sees the room is messy and see woman’s products so obviously he’ll get to perve on some lady today.

Jack goes under the bed to see if he can find anything until he here’s the door open and giant booming noises

...... who enters the room
12.title: Sneak Into A Bedroom

choices: Play a prank with her phone
123.content:
Jack turns around and sees a giant woman walking in. Jack runs under the bed to hide from being seen. While under the bed Jack sees a two giant legs walking wearing a pair of high heel with black soles and a see through top meaning you can see her feet.

Jack recognises those shows and see that they belong to Olivia, the uptight business woman who on a business meeting. She is very Beautiful in her business suit and trousers but you can tell that she is wore out.

She is on the phone with her boss and you can tell she is just tired.

OLIVIA: “‘look the deal is done and now your telling me I have to stay in this shithole hotel until further notice are you kidding me”

Olivia tosses the phone onto her bag and collapses on the bed (you feel entire bed shaking at your size). Olivia says out loud “What I would give for a good fucking”.,You laugh while under the bed.

Olivia takes of her shoes and you see them both land in front of you from under the bed. You can also see the rest of her clothes on the floor as she strips to her underwear.

Olivia decides to take a nap

What do you decide to do next.
123.title: Olivia

125.content: Who else can come in
125.title: Other

choices: Kate and Millie’s chicken and fries
14.content:
Jack decides to sneak into the dining room and get (someone else’s) bite to eat.

Jack goes through a hole in the wall, climbs up the wall and to the ceiling.

Jack is now on a ceiling light and decides where he would like to jump (he so small they will barely here a sound of you landing).

Who food do you land in,
14.title: Go To The Dining Room

info.brief_description: You are a tiny person secretly living in a hotel with a bunch of giant Woman. PLEASE ADD.
info.description:
You are Jack, a 13 year old boy who is one 1cm tall and lives in a hotel that’s just so happen to be ran by a bunch of women and also coincidentally has a lot of guests that are women. This Hotel is a homey countryside hotel that right next to a beach.

RULES:
1). Don’t Kill Jack.
2). Keep its unaware (if found he’s a bug or toy).
3). Anything sexual goes, Go Cazy.
4). No Males In This Story Other Than Jack.
5). Describe the women well.

CHARACTERS:
Jack - a 13 year old boy who got shrunk in this hotel and has been living there in secret.

HOTEL EMPLOYEES:
1). Viola - a headstrong, no nonsense, charming manager of this hotel. She usually wears a formal black tight dress and black high heels (Viola Davis/https://www3.pictures.stylebistro.com/gi/2017+Summer+TCA+Tour+Disney+ABC+Televis...).

2). Kaley - a bored tired and full of herself receptionist. She doesn’t like her job but does it okay. She is wearing white shirt (with her breasts slightly revealing), black mini-skirt and black bumps. (Kaley Cuoco/https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/ba/Kaley_Cuoco_by_Gage_Skidmore...).

3). Sofia - a hot tempered, germaphobic, smoking hot Colombian maid. She funny but she takes cleaning very seriously and she hates bugs. She wears a typical black maid outfit and black strappy high heels (but sometimes she likes to be barefoot.) (Sofia Vergaras/https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/14/Sof%C3%ADa_Vergara_2019_by_G...)

4). Toni - a efficient and bossy head chef. She loves her kitchen and cooking so much that she wont let anyone ruin it (including bugs). Toni wears a chefs uniform although secret she doesn’t were anything underneath. (Toni Collette/https://i.pinimg.com/originals/18/c8/cc/18c8cc0f81a4c395a795f498424192d0.jpg).

5). Emma. A shy, dorky and funny general assistant. She also doesn’t want to work here but she does her job good. She were a business dress and flats. (Emma Stone/https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMjI4NjM1NDkyN15BMl5BanBnXkFtZTgwODgyNTY1...)


GUESTS:
1). Marisa - a complaining and nagging guest. She is a regular their it’s almost like she never leaves, she wears a red t shirt, white pants and white high heels (Marisa Tomei/https://imagesvc.meredithcorp.io/v3/mm/image?q=85&c=sc&poi=face&w=2000&h=2000&ur...)

2). Olivia - a young millionaire business woman visiting the hotel for a few nights. She’s a privilege, pompous and doesn’t care about anyone except herself. She is wearing a black suit and trousers and is wearing see through/black high heels (Olivia Wilde/https://deadline.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/olivia-wilde.jpg).

3). Kate - a kind hearted and funny British woman who is visiting from England. She probably the nicest one in the hotel. She is wearing a blue shirt, tight jeans and wedge shoes (Kate Beckinsale/https://m.media-amazon.com/images/M/MV5BMTM3MzY2MDYwOF5BMl5BanBnXkFtZTcwODQ3MDA0...).

4). Millie - Kate’s 16 year old daughter. She’s stuck up, rebellious and enjoys torturing bugs (not killing). She is wearing a white t shirt, short jeans and flip flops. (Millie Bobby Brown/https://i.pinimg.com/564x/bf/e4/e5/bfe4e5d6c71419c5852fa352d4608b48.jpg).

5). Gina - a physically strong and athletic woman staying at the hotel. She is here for a small MMA fight. She loves her body but she hates bugs. She is wearing a tight black vest, workout shorts and flip flops. (Gina Carano/https://www.sportscasting.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/Gina-Carano.jpg).
